english: To the beloved of Lakshmi, treasure of auspiciousness, treasure for those who seek
roman: Shriyah kantaya kalyana nidhaye nidhaye arthinam

english: Auspiciousness to Shri Venkatesha who dwells at Venkata, to Shrinivasa

hindi: क्षमां दयां च सौम्यत्वं मधुरां वाणिमेव च।
english: Patience, compassion, gentleness and sweet speech
roman: Kshamam dayam cha saumyatvam madhu ram vanim eva cha

english: Skill and compassion mixed together — these Venkatesha bears
roman: Patavam cha kripa mishram dadhate Venkatesha rah

english: To Tirupati Venkatesha, to Balaji — salutations
To the dweller of the seven hills, to Shrinivasa — salutations
roman: Sapta giri nivasaya Shrinivasa namo namah

english: Whoever reads this Venkatesha Stotram with devotion always
roman: Venkatesha stotram idam yah pathed bhaktitah sada

english: By the grace of Shrinivasa attains abundance and prosperity
